source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F. 0 Flow-NTC open circuit NTC broken, NTC cable broken, Defective connection at NTC, Defective connection at electronics

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F. 1 Return-NTC open circuit NTC broken, NTC cable broken, Defective connection at NTC, Defective connection at electronics

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.10 Flow NTC short circuit NTC defective, short circuit in cable harness, cable/casing shortcut

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.11 Return NTC short circuit NTC defective, short circuit in cable harness, cable/casing shortcut

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.13 Tank NTC short circuit NTC defective, short circuit in cable harness, cable/casing shortcut

fault_codes.description: Safety temperature limiter by NTC activated
possible_causes: Flow-NTC not correctly thermal-connected or defective

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.20 Safety temperature limiter by NTC activated Flow-NTC not correctly thermal-connected or defective; appliance does not shut down

possible_causes: Too little water in the appliance
cable to pump or water sensor defective

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.22 Dry fire Too little water in the appliance, water pressure sensor defective, cable to pump or water sensor defective, pump blocked or defective, pump output too low

fault_codes.description: Water shortage, temperature difference between flow and return NTC too large

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.23 Water shortage, temperature difference between flow and return NTC too large Pump blocked or defective, pump output too low, flow and return NTC interchanged

fault_codes.description: Water shortage, temperature rise too quick

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.24 Water shortage, temperature rise too quick Pump blocked, insufficient pump output, air in appliance, water pressure too low

fault_codes.description: Interruption in the compact thermal module cable harness
possible_causes: Compact thermal module cable harness defective

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.25 Interruption in the compact thermal module cable harness Compact thermal module cable harness defective

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.27 Incorrect sensing of flame Flame detector defective

fault_codes.description: Appliance does not start: Attempts to ignite during start failed
possible_causes: Faults in the gas supply such as: Gas meter or gas pressure detector defective
igniter (ignition transformer, ignition cable, ignition plug) defective

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.28 Appliance does not start: Attempts to ignite during start failed Faults in the gas supply such as: Gas meter or gas pressure detector defective, Air in gas, Gas flow pressure too low, Fire protection tap has disengaged, Faults in the gas valve, wrong gas setting, igniter (ignition transformer, ignition cable, ignition plug) defective, ionisation current stopped (cable, electrode), faulty earthing in appliance, electronics defective

fault_codes.description: Flame goes off during operation and subsequent ignition attempts failed

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.29 Flame goes off during operation and subsequent ignition attempts failed Gas supply temporarily stopped, faulty earthing of appliance

possible_causes: plug not inserted correctly on fan

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.32 Fan speed variation Fan blocked, plug not inserted correctly on fan, hall sensor defective, fault in cable harness, electronics defective

possible_causes: two power sources on eBUS with different polarity

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.49 eBUS undervoltage Short circuit on eBUS, overload on eBUS or two power sources on eBUS with different polarity

possible_causes: Short circuit/earth (ground) leak in cable harness to gas valves
gas valve assembly defective (earth/ground leak from coils)

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.61 Gas-valve control defective Short circuit/earth (ground) leak in cable harness to gas valves, gas valve assembly defective (earth/ground leak from coils), electronic control system defective

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.62 Gas valve shutoff delay Gas valve leaking, electronics defective

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.63 EEPROM error Electronics defective

possible_causes: Short-circuit in flow or return NTC or electronics defective

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.64 Electronics/NTC fault Short-circuit in flow or return NTC or electronics defective

possible_causes: Electronics too hot due to external effect

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.65 Electronics temperature too high Electronics too hot due to external effect, electronics defective

fault_codes.description: Flame detector input signal is outside the limits (0 or 5 V)

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.67 Flame detector input signal is outside the limits (0 or 5 V) Electronics defective

fault_codes.description: No valid DSN in display and/or mainboard
possible_causes: Spare part failure display and maiboard interchanged at same time and device specific number not adjusted

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.70 No valid DSN in display and/or mainboard Spare part failure display and maiboard interchanged at same time and device specific number not adjusted

fault_codes.description: Flow NTC reports constant value (stuck at)

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.71 Flow NTC reports constant value (stuck at) Flow NTC is defective

possible_causes: Flow and/or return NTC is defective (tolerances too big)

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.72 Flow and/or return NTC fault Flow and/or return NTC is defective (tolerances too big)

fault_codes.description: Water pressure sensor signal out of range (too low)
possible_causes: Cable to water pressure sensor is broken or has a short-circuit at 0 V or water pressure sensor defective

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.73 Water pressure sensor signal out of range (too low) Cable to water pressure sensor is broken or has a short-circuit at 0 V or water pressure sensor defective

fault_codes.description: Water pressure sensor signal out of range (too high)
possible_causes: Cable to water pressure sensor has a short-circuit at 5 V/24 V or internal fault in water pressure sensor

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.74 Water pressure sensor signal out of range (too high) Cable to water pressure sensor has a short-circuit at 5 V/24 V or internal fault in water pressure sensor

fault_codes.description: No pressure rise was detected on turning on the pump
possible_causes: Water pressure sensor or/and pump defective
Too little water in appliance; check adjustable by-pass
connect external expension vessel to return

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.75 No pressure rise was detected on turning on the pump Water pressure sensor or/and pump defective, Air in the heating system, quick bleeder defective, Too little water in appliance; check adjustable by-pass; connect external expension vessel to return

fault_codes.description: Overheating protection on primary heat exchanger triggered
possible_causes: Cable or cable connection of fuse in the primary heat exchanger defective

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.76 Overheating protection on primary heat exchanger triggered Cable or cable connection of fuse in the primary heat exchanger defective, or primary heat exchanger defective

fault_codes.description: condensate pump or feedback of accessorie blocks heating
possible_causes: condensate pump defective or flume flap feedback triggered

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.77 condensate pump or feedback of accessorie blocks heating condensate pump defective or flume flap feedback triggered

possible_causes: link box VR65 connected to combination boiler

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.78 wrong configuration with accessory link box VR65 connected to combination boiler

source_refs.table_title: Table 8.4 Error codes
source_refs.source_quote: con no communication to mainboard connection error display mainboard
